MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Anne Hipshman; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff S & L Realty is present. Represented by Rob Link.
Attorney David Stern for the plaintiff.
Defendant Geoff Shepherd is present.
Attorney Yuri Gottesman appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Anne Hipshman, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of DEC-09-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
